description_long: This house is a large, modern residential building surrounded by a variety of trees, including conifers and flowering deciduous types. The structure features a complex, multi-level roofline with both flat and gently sloped sections, and several protruding volumes that create a dynamic facade. The exterior appears to be finished in light gray materials, possibly stucco or concrete, with accents of wood or similar warm-toned material visible on some overhangs and balcony areas. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the building, providing ample natural light and views of the landscaped surroundings. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, and the main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area. The landscaping is carefully arranged, with trees lining the perimeter and smaller shrubs and flowering plants near the house.
description: A large, modern house with a complex roofline, light gray exterior, and extensive landscaping with conifer and flowering trees. Features include large windows, a covered entryway, and a driveway leading to a garage.
description_view_0: From this view, the house is seen behind a row of conifer trees, with the driveway and garage visible at the back and a landscaped area with flowering trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the main entryway, flanked by conifer trees and a mix of flowering and leafy trees, with the driveway extending to the right.
description_view_2: The house is viewed from the side, showing the full length of the driveway, a prominent garage, and a symmetrical arrangement of conifer trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the rear of the house, with a large covered balcony or porch area, and a dense row of conifer trees in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped sections
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entry with steps, porch, and wood or metal accents, flanked by landscaping and conifer trees
